content.sentence_text: He saved the data on the server a while ago.
The device was connected to the cable a minute ago.
Yesterday she decided to upload the report later.
The keyboard needed some attention last week.

activity_2_e.text:
Listen to each question, use the pause to answer it, then compare your response with the model answer.
සෑම ප්‍රශ්නයකටම සවන් දෙන්න, පිළිතුරු දීමට විරාමය භාවිතා කරන්න, ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර ආදර්ශ පිළිතුර සමඟ සසඳන්න.
ஒவ்வொரு கேள்வியையும் கேட்டு, இடைவெளியைப் பயன்படுத்தி பதிலளியுங்கள். பின்னர் உங்கள் பதிலை மாதிரி பதிலுடன் ஒப்பிடுங்கள்.

tables: I play the piano every day.

example_dialogues.text_a: You look very tired. What did you do yesterday?
You look very tired. What did you do yesterday?
example_dialogues.text_b: I served vegetarian meals all day.

dialogues.text_b: We studied our notes all day.

dialogues.text_a: You look very tired. What did you do yesterday?
dialogues.text_b: We waited at the service centre all day.

dialogues.text_a: You look very tired. What did you do yesterday?

activity_a.text:
Put the words in the correct order. The first word in each sentence is in bold.
වචන නිවැරදි අනුපිළිවෙලට තබන්න. සෑම වාක්‍යයකම පළමු වචනය තද අකුරින් ලියවා ඇත.
சொற்களை சரியான வரிசையில் வைக்கவும். ஒவ்வொரு வாக்கியத்திலும் முதல் வார்த்தை திட எழுத்தில் உள்ளது.

content.sentence: She painted the old computer workstation yesterday.
He opened the server room last Wednesday.
They defragmented the hard disk drives recently.
I collected the network diagrams last Tuesday.
We reconnected the central power supply today.
She finished the maintenance report yesterday afternoon.
He started a new cybersecurity course.
They e-mailed alerts regarding virus threats.
I cleaned the large ICT training lab.
We submitted the software licence forms today.

activity_b.text: She painted the old computer workstation yesterday.
He opened the server room last Wednesday.
They defragmented the hard disk drives recently.

We submitted the software licence forms today.

activity_a.text:
Listen to the recording and match the words to the  pictures. 
පටිගත කිරීම අසන්න සහ වචන පින්තූර සමඟ ගැලපෙන්න.
பதிவை கேட்டு, சொற்களை படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_b.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_c.text:
Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

Questions.question: Why was the network server making a strange sound?
Questions.answer: The cooling unit belt was loose.
options: The cooling unit belt was loose.
The cooling unit belt was very loose.

Questions.question: Why is the printer cabinet door not closing properly?
What problem did the router storage rack have?
Questions.answer: It was unstable and a screw was missing.
options: It was too small for the devices.
It was unstable and the screws were missing.
It was unstable and a screw was missing.

Questions.question: Why is the UPS display still unclear?
Questions.answer: The display bulb might be failing.
options: The display bulb might be failing.
The display bulb might be broken.

Questions.question: Why was the desktop cooling unit shaking?

activity_c.text: Good morning, sir. The ICT lab is a bit noisy today.
I think the large network server is making a strange pulsing sound.
Morning, Meena. I’ve been checking the equipment since 7 a.m.
When I checked that server, the cooling unit belt was a little loose.
I tightened it, but it is still making a soft vibration.
I also noticed the printer cabinet yesterday.
It was fine, but this morning the side door is not closing properly because one of the hinges is bent.
Yes, the hinge was bent.
I adjusted it, but we might need to replace it later.
Can you also check the storage rack near the routers?
The trainees cleaned it yesterday evening, but this morning it looked unstable on the right side.
I inspected it.
One screw was missing, so I added a new one.
But that rack was unstable for a long time.
We might need a new frame.
Another issue, the UPS display was blurry last night.
We cleaned the panel, but the numbers are still unclear.
I tested the wiring early this morning.
Everything was normal, but the display bulb might be failing.
I ordered a replacement, and it should arrive in the afternoon.
Sir, one more thing. The small desktop cooling unit was shaking.
When I opened the back cover, I saw that the motor was dusty.
Yes, the motor was dusty, so I cleaned it.
But I will inspect the fan bearings after tea.
Thank you, sir. We can’t start today’s configurations until everything is stable.
No worries. I will finish all the checks before 11.30 a.m.

activity_d.text: Good morning, sir. The ICT lab is a bit noisy today.
I think the large network server is making a strange pulsing sound.
Morning, Meena. I’ve been checking the equipment since 7 a.m.
When I checked that server, the cooling unit belt was a little loose.
I tightened it, but it is still making a soft vibration.
I also noticed the printer cabinet yesterday.
It was fine, but this morning the side door is not closing properly because one of the hinges is bent.
Yes, the hinge was bent.
I adjusted it, but we might need to replace it later.
Can you also check the storage rack near the routers?
The trainees cleaned it yesterday evening, but this morning it looked unstable on the right side.
I inspected it.
One screw was missing, so I added a new one.
But that rack was unstable for a long time.
We might need a new frame.
Another issue, the UPS display was blurry last night.
We cleaned the panel, but the numbers are still unclear.
I tested the wiring early this morning.
Everything was normal, but the display bulb might be failing.
I ordered a replacement, and it should arrive in the afternoon.
Sir, one more thing. The small desktop cooling unit was shaking.
When I opened the back cover, I saw that the motor was dusty.
Yes, the motor was dusty, so I cleaned it.
But I will inspect the fan bearings after tea.
Thank you, sir. We can’t start today’s configurations until everything is stable.
No worries. I will finish all the checks before 11.30 a.m.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම පියවරන් ඔබට මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට උදව් කරනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:

වීඩියෝව වර දෙකක් බලන්න.
வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.

Explain any new words using Google Translator.
Google පරිවර්තකය භාවිතයෙන් නව වචන කිහිපයක් විස්තර කරන්න.
Google மொழிபெயர்ப்பாளரைப் பயன்படுத்தி சில புதிய வார்த்தைகளை விளக்குங்கள்.

Listen and repeat.

கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.
